en: to the Wii Spa, an authentic Korean spa.
ko: Wii 스파, 진정한 한국 스파에 오신 것을 환영합니다.

en: I brought with me Steven Yeun, international star.
ko: 저는 국제 스타 스티븐 연을 데리고 왔습니다.

en: Come on in here. Don't look so scared, you okay? Yeah, I'm good. You all right?
Yeah, this is gonna... You look worried. Yeah, I've only been here one time.
ko: 네, 이게... 걱정하는 것 같아요. 네, 여기 한 번만 와봤어요.

en: You battle zombies for a living.
You fight the undead, yet you seem worried about coming to a spa.
You walk around here naked? No one told me that was part of this room.
Oh, we're supposed to be naked. I've never been naked.
ko: 우리는 벌거벗어야 해요. 저는 한 번도 벌거벗어본 적이 없어요.

en: So what did you just give me right here? You just gave me a... So that's a large, that's your t-shirt
ko: 그래서 방금 저에게 주신 건 뭐예요?, 저에게 주신 건...

en: for when you go to the co-ed floor. And here are your shorts.
ko: 혼성 층에 갈 때 입는 거예요.

en: Oh, there's a co-ed area? Yes. If there are going to be other women around, what are the rules?
ko: 다른 여성들이 있을 경우, 규칙은 무엇인가요?

en: May we speak to them? You can mingle, whatever you want.
There's no sexual activity, or you will be banned for life. Banned for how long?
Life. Oh, life ban. Is that one of the policies?
ko: 평생. 아, 평생 금지. 그게 정책 중 하나인가요?
